response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics matched the provided reference perfectly.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference lyrics and manually adjusted them to synchronize with the exact audio timings.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed each line precisely to the millisecond, handling rapid-fire transitions and overlapping phrases cleanly to avoid cascading delays. No closed caption tags or music symbols were used.

subtitles.original: 紡いでたら「一途」に変わったよ
subtitles.english: As I kept weaving, it turned into devotion.

subtitles.original: あたりさわりない言葉じゃ
subtitles.english: It's not something that harmless words...

subtitles.original: 覆いきれないほどのマイワールド
subtitles.english: can completely cover in my world.

subtitles.original: 明日で呼ぶ声の持ち主は
subtitles.english: The owner of the voice that calls out tomorrow

subtitles.original: 他でもないこの心だ
subtitles.english: is none other than this heart.

subtitles.original: たった、見えていないその言葉も
subtitles.english: Even those words that cannot be seen

subtitles.original: 「言葉」だと足りないだけ
subtitles.english: are simply not enough as "words".

subtitles.original: 掴んだもの 落としたもの
subtitles.english: Things I grasped, things I dropped...

subtitles.original: 転んだって立って 見えた視界から
subtitles.english: Even if I fall, I stand up, and from the view I see...

subtitles.original: ロックユー！解き放って
subtitles.english: Rock you! Release it!

subtitles.original: ロックユー！解き放って
subtitles.english: Rock you! Release it!

subtitles.original: フォーユー！響きだして
subtitles.english: For you! Start resounding!

subtitles.original: フォーユー！響きだして
subtitles.english: For you! Start resounding!

subtitles.original: 景色変えてゆく
subtitles.english: The scenery is changing.

subtitles.original: まだ遠く遠くまで 広がった空に
subtitles.english: In the sky spread out so far, far away,

subtitles.original: やっと踏み出すこの一歩なんて ちっぽけだけど
subtitles.english: this single step I finally take is tiny, but...

subtitles.original: 届かない場所へと続いていく
subtitles.english: it continues toward a place beyond reach.

subtitles.original: どんな風に雨に消えない 白線をかく
subtitles.english: No matter the wind or rain, I'll draw a white line that won't fade.

subtitles.original: もっと高く高くまで 羽ばたいていたい
subtitles.english: Higher and higher, I want to keep flapping my wings.

subtitles.original: そして彼方色で繋ぐ 地平で待ってて
subtitles.english: Wait for me on the horizon, connected by distant colors.

subtitles.original: もう願いに嘘はない ここがスキ！
subtitles.english: There are no more lies in my wishes. I love it here!

subtitles.original: どんな世界も瞬間も輝く アイがあるから
subtitles.english: Every world and every moment shines, because there is love.

subtitles.original: 今はただ想うこと言えばいい 「愛してるよ！！」
subtitles.english: Now I just have to say what's on my mind: "I love you!"

subtitles.original: 澄み渡った空に白線
subtitles.english: A white line in the clear blue sky.

subtitles.original: 不安と期待のアンビバレント
subtitles.english: The ambivalence of anxiety and expectation.

subtitles.original: でも君はもう気づいてる
subtitles.english: But you already know.

subtitles.original: もっと高く高く高く飛んでいける！
subtitles.english: We can fly higher, higher, and higher!

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: More...

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: More...

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: More...

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: More...

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: More...

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: More...

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: More...

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: More...

subtitles.original: 鏡よ教えて 私の証は
subtitles.english: Mirror, mirror, tell me, where is the proof of my existence?

subtitles.original: どこにあるのだろう
subtitles.english: Where could it be?

subtitles.original: 分からない 分からないよ
subtitles.english: I don't know, I just don't know.

subtitles.original: 周りと比べたってさ
subtitles.english: Comparing myself to others...

subtitles.original: 虚しくなるだけ
subtitles.english: only makes me feel empty.

subtitles.original: あのノイズが
subtitles.english: That noise...

subtitles.original: 涙に似た調べに 涙を奪う
subtitles.english: steals my tears with a melody resembling them.

subtitles.original: 切り取った風景を 道しるべにしよう
subtitles.english: Let's make this captured scenery our signpost.

subtitles.original: そうだ
subtitles.english: That's right.

subtitles.original: 傷ついた感情も 捨てていくなら
subtitles.english: If we are going to cast away our wounded emotions...

subtitles.original: そっと響くカンパネラ
subtitles.english: The softly resounding Campanella...

subtitles.original: 新しい未来を感じてる
subtitles.english: makes us feel a new future.

subtitles.original: 怖くたって進むしかないでしょ
subtitles.english: Even if we're scared, we have to move forward, right?

subtitles.original: 遠くまで
subtitles.english: Far away...

subtitles.original: もっと もっと
subtitles.english: more, more...

subtitles.original: 届けこの祈りよ光となれ
subtitles.english: reach out, this prayer, and turn into light!

subtitles.original: もっと もっと
subtitles.english: More, more...

subtitles.original: 少しずつでもいい
subtitles.english: Even if it's just a little at a time,

subtitles.original: 私という答えを
subtitles.english: we will find the answer that is "me"...

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: more...

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: more...

subtitles.original: もっと もっと
subtitles.english: more and more!

subtitles.original: 夜空よ教えて 私の証は
subtitles.english: Night sky, tell me, will the proof of my existence...

subtitles.original: 輝けるのかな
subtitles.english: be able to shine?

subtitles.original: 見つけたい 見つけたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to find it, I really want to find it!

subtitles.original: 誰かの決めたレールは
subtitles.english: The rails decided by someone else

subtitles.original: 苦しくなるだけ
subtitles.english: just make things painful.

subtitles.original: ねぇ ノイズも力に変えるよ この心に誓う
subtitles.english: Hey, I'll turn even the noise into strength. I swear it to my heart.

subtitles.original: 錆びついた運命の 歯車を回そう
subtitles.english: Let's turn the gears of our rusted destiny.

subtitles.original: ほら
subtitles.english: See...

subtitles.original: 飾った感情は 脱ぎ捨てるから
subtitles.english: because I'll cast off all decorated emotions.

subtitles.original: そっと紡ぐシンフォニー
subtitles.english: The softly spun symphony...

subtitles.original: 叶えたい願いを信じてる
subtitles.english: believes in the wishes we want to fulfill.

subtitles.original: 胸を張って歌うしかないでしょ
subtitles.english: We have no choice but to sing with pride, right?

subtitles.original: 全力で
subtitles.english: With all our might...

subtitles.original: もっと もっと
subtitles.english: more, more...

subtitles.original: やがて希望の歌に変わる日まで
subtitles.english: until the day it finally turns into a song of hope...

subtitles.original: もっと もっと
subtitles.english: more, more...

subtitles.original: 悩みながらでいい 全てが宝物
subtitles.english: It's okay to worry, everything is a treasure.

subtitles.original: いつの日か この声を 受け取ってくれたなら
subtitles.english: If someday you receive this voice of mine,

subtitles.original: この言葉を君に もう大丈夫 ひとりじゃない
subtitles.english: then these words are for you: "It's okay now, you are not alone."

subtitles.original: 強い想いを
subtitles.english: These strong feelings...

subtitles.original: 繋ぐよ 一歩踏み出してみた
subtitles.english: I will connect. I tried taking a step forward...

subtitles.original: 優しく世界は微笑む
subtitles.english: and the world smiled gently.

subtitles.original: 高鳴る気持ちに身を任せて
subtitles.english: Leaving myself to my soaring emotions...

subtitles.original: さあ行こう！
subtitles.english: let's go!
